overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a slow approach to a large wooden plantation house under bright moonlight. The camera moves through an overgrown field, along a dirt path beside the house, and finally up the front porch steps where warm interior light glows from a window.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the silhouetted plantation house

entered.detail: large two-story wooden mansion with dual chimneys silhouetted against the moon
tall stone chimney on the left side of the house roof
tall stone chimney on the right side emitting thin smoke
large mature tree with dense foliage to the left of the approach
tall wild grass covering the field floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a moonlit rural landscape with a large wooden plantation house silhouetted against the bright moon. The camera moves forward through an overgrown grassy field, gradually approaching the house while the two stone chimneys and a large oak tree remain visible landmarks.

events.description: transition from overgrown grass field to compacted dirt path alongside the house

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the house on a worn dirt path

entered.detail: worn dirt trail running alongside the house with scattered stones
wooden support pillars for the house's side porch

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the grassy field onto a compacted dirt path running alongside the house. The plantation house now dominates the right side of the frame with its wooden porch columns becoming visible. The oak tree recedes into the distance on the left as the path continues alongside the building's weathered wooden siding.

scene_state.functional_zone: front porch entrance with illuminated window

events.description: warm yellow interior light becomes visible through a ground-floor window
beginning to ascend the wooden steps to the porch

agents.ego_description: approaching the front porch and climbing the wooden steps toward the illuminated entrance

entered.detail: ground-floor window glowing with warm yellow lamplight
weathered wooden steps leading up to the porch
wooden barrels stored under the porch overhang

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the front porch where a warm illuminated window contrasts with the cool moonlight. Moving under the porch roof's shelter, the scene transitions from natural moonlight to mixed lighting. The camera approaches and ascends the wooden steps, passing barrels stored beneath the porch, with the glowing window providing the primary light source in the final moments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit rural landscape that gradually closes in on the warm, illuminated entrance of a wooden plantation house. It begins by moving forward through an overgrown grassy field, with the house silhouetted against a bright moon and flanked by stone chimneys and a large oak tree. As the camera leaves the grass, it transitions onto a compacted dirt path where the weathered wooden siding and porch columns of the house begin to dominate the frame. The scene then shifts toward the front porch, moving from the cool moonlight into the shelter of the roof where the lighting becomes a mix of natural and artificial glow. Finally, the camera ascends the wooden steps past stored barrels, drawing closer to a warmly lit window that serves as the primary light source.
